list.name: action
list.label: Event Name
list.description: Filter by audit.name (regex, empty = all). e.g. auth.signin.failed

list.name: resource
list.label: Resource Type
list.description: Filter by resource.type (regex, empty = all). e.g. user, job, application

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="jobpostings-backend"} | json | event = `audit` | audit_name =~ `.*$action.*` | audit_actor_id =~ `.*$actor.*` | audit_resource_type =~ `.*$resource.*` | audit_outcome =~ `$outcome` [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name="jobpostings-backend"} | json | event = `audit` | audit_outcome = `failure` | audit_name =~ `.*$action.*` | audit_actor_id =~ `.*$actor.*` | audit_resource_type =~ `.*$resource.*` [$__range]))

sum by (audit_name) (count_over_time({service_name="jobpostings-backend"} | json | event = `audit` | audit_name =~ `.*$action.*` | audit_actor_id =~ `.*$actor.*` | audit_resource_type =~ `.*$resource.*` | audit_outcome =~ `$outcome` [1m]))

panels.title: Audit Event Stream
panels.description: Click a row to expand. Each row carries trace_id as a derived field — click the TraceID link to jump to Tempo.

targets.expr: {service_name="jobpostings-backend"} | json | event = `audit` | audit_name =~ `.*$action.*` | audit_actor_id =~ `.*$actor.*` | audit_resource_type =~ `.*$resource.*` | audit_outcome =~ `$outcome` | line_format `{{.audit_name}} outcome={{.audit_outcome}} actor={{.audit_actor_id}} resource={{.audit_resource_type}}:{{.audit_resource_id}} trace_id={{.trace_id}}`
